_comment: Copy to config/telegram-chats.json and replace ids with real Telegram chat ids (groups/supergroups use negative ids).

-1001234567890._comment: Recommended setup: disable privacy mode for this bot via BotFather (/setprivacy -> Disable) so it can see every message in this group, then keep requireMention: true so it only RESPONDS to @mentions/replies/!commands — the same shape as Discord's MessageContent intent + requireMention. Privacy mode ON (BotFather default) is a degraded fallback: Telegram withholds plain text, @mentions, and !commands from privacy-ON bots, so a requireMention: true chat becomes effectively reply-only.
-1001234567890.name: general

-1009876543210._comment: requireMention: false only receives every message once privacy mode is disabled for this bot via BotFather — with privacy mode ON, Telegram withholds ordinary messages from the bot regardless of this setting.
-1009876543210.name: announcements
